summary: Iteration 11 - Comprehensive testing of Reservations, Reviews, Smart Reports APIs and Settings permissions. All 20 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend testing confirmed all new pages working correctly with proper data display.
passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/auth/login - Admin login successful
Backend: POST /api/auth/login - Tenant user (ahmed@albait.com) login successful
Backend: GET /api/reservations - Returns reservations list (200 OK)
Backend: POST /api/reservations - Creates new reservation with auto-generated reservation_number
Backend: GET /api/reservations?date=YYYY-MM-DD - Date filter works correctly
Backend: GET /api/reservations/stats - Returns total, today, pending, confirmed counts
Backend: GET /api/reviews - Returns reviews list (200 OK)
Backend: POST /api/reviews - Creates new review with rating and comment
Backend: GET /api/reviews/stats - Returns average_rating, star distribution, responded/pending counts
Backend: GET /api/reviews?rating=5 - Rating filter works correctly
Backend: PUT /api/reviews/{id}/respond - Adds management response to review
Backend: GET /api/smart-reports/sales?period=today - Returns sales summary with by_type and by_payment
Backend: GET /api/smart-reports/sales?period=week - Weekly report works
Backend: GET /api/smart-reports/sales?period=month - Monthly report works
Backend: GET /api/smart-reports/products - Returns top_products list
Backend: GET /api/settings/dashboard - Returns settings permissions for tenant
Backend: GET /api/tenant/info - Returns tenant info with logo_url
Backend: GET /api/uploads/logos/{filename} - Logo file accessible (200 OK)
Backend: GET /api/tables - Returns tables list for reservation selection
Frontend: Dashboard shows tenant logo for ahmed@albait.com
Frontend: Dashboard shows tenant name 'مطعم البيت العراقي'
Frontend: Settings page shows correct tabs for tenant (Users, Branches, Categories, Products, Printers, Notifications)
Frontend: Settings page hides restricted tabs for tenant (Customers, Delivery Companies, Call Center)
Frontend: /reservations page loads with stats cards and reservations list
Frontend: /reservations page has 'حجز جديد' button and status filters
Frontend: /reviews page loads with average rating (4.4) and distribution chart
Frontend: /reviews page shows reviews with ratings, comments, and management replies
Frontend: /smart-reports page loads with sales summary cards
Frontend: /smart-reports page shows 'رؤى ذكية' (Smart Insights) section
Frontend: /smart-reports page shows hourly sales chart and top products list
critical_code_review_comments: All new APIs (reservations, reviews, smart-reports) working correctly with proper tenant isolation
Settings permissions correctly applied - tenant sees only allowed tabs
Reviews page uses mock data as fallback when API returns empty - graceful degradation
Smart Reports page uses mock data for insights when API doesn't provide them
seed_data_creation: Test reservations and reviews created and cleaned up during testing

mocked_features.reviews_page: Uses demo data when API returns empty array
mocked_features.smart_reports_page: Uses demo data for insights and hourly data when API doesn't provide them

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 11 completed. New features tested: 1) Reservations page (/reservations) with CRUD operations and stats. 2) Reviews page (/reviews) with ratings, comments, and management responses. 3) Smart Reports page (/smart-reports) with sales analytics, top products, and hourly charts. 4) Settings permissions correctly hide tabs for tenant users. 5) Logo display working for tenant ahmed@albait.com. All APIs return 200 OK. Frontend pages use mock data as fallback when API returns empty arrays.
